name: Fleury S.A.
summary: Fleury S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides medical services in the diagnostic, treatment, and clinical analysis, health management, and medical care areas in Brazil. The company operates through three segments: Diagnostic Medicine, Integrated Medicine, and Dental. It offers laboratory and image exam, diagnostic information, check-up and reference laboratory, dental imaging exam, dental radiology, and diagnostic imaging services. As of December 31, 2019, the company had 245 patient service centers and 24 operations in hospitals under the Fleury, Labs a+, Felippe Mattoso, Lafe, a+SP, Campana, Weinman, a+, Serdil, a+ and Diagmax, IRN/ CPC, Diagnosson a+, and Inlab brand names. Fleury S.A. was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
